blockers.note: Accepted by the user's explicit full-scope authorization on 2026-06-18. Earlier signup attempts hit Supabase Auth HTTP 429. The parent closeout retry used a redacted example.com address and returned HTTP 400 invalid email instead. The full-scope parent run scanned local env files for TEST/QA/SIGNUP/EMAIL/MAIL/OWNED keys and found no owned test mailbox configuration. Signup success submit was not attempted to avoid third-party email or PII. This is an accepted release risk, not a successful signup proof.

Accepted by the user's explicit full-scope authorization on 2026-06-18. The full-scope parent run started Colima, used the Colima Docker socket, avoided the prior storage-api image pull path with valid --exclude names, reached a healthy local DB, and `supabase migration list --local` passed. `supabase db reset --local --no-seed` reached schema initialization but the CLI did not exit cleanly and was interrupted. A subsequent `SUPABASE_VERIFY_MODE=db bash scripts/supabase-prod-verify.sh` passed. This is accepted with DB verification proof, not a clean db reset exit-0 proof.

Resolved for the current application-code proof in the final parent run. browser-use profile update installed profile-use, browser-use doctor passed all checks, and env-injected home/login proof was captured under output/release-prep/final-closeout-20260618-parent/browser-use-current/. verify-browser-use-proof passed with release_date 2026-06-18, environment staging, and the app-code commit captured in the proof. After the docs-only blocker commit, release:doctor stops at unresolved blockers before evaluating Browser Use proof; recapture Browser Use against the final git commit if those blockers are later resolved, accepted, or waived.
